achievements.title: Proper Little Project
achievements.description: Small. Tidy. Suspicious only because it is so quiet.
achievements.reason: Only 0 unique packages, no install scripts, no exotic sources, no duplicates.

achievements.title: Corporate Séance
achievements.description: Licences? In this economy? Speak to the void instead.

achievements.title: Critical Pub Discussion
achievements.description: Multiple groups, multiple versions, nobody can hear themselves think.

achievements.title: Cursed But Efficient
achievements.description: Deep tree. Few packages. The maths is suspiciously fine.

achievements.title: Dependency Necromancer
achievements.description: Pulling old packages out of their npm graves.

achievements.title: Downloaded From A Forum
achievements.description: Found on a forum, copied across, installed without reading.

achievements.title: Duplicate Sanctuary
achievements.description: At this point you are simply collecting them.

achievements.title: Install Script Summoner
achievements.description: Ten or more packages run code during install. The household trembles.

achievements.title: Left Pad Memorial Edition
achievements.description: Includes left-pad. In this household? In 2026?

achievements.title: National Infrastructure
achievements.description: Critical to too many things. Cannot be safely turned off.

achievements.title: Northern Line
achievements.description: An impressively long line. Eventually it loops back on itself.

achievements.title: StackOverflow Folk Archive
achievements.description: Built from answers, rituals, and one accepted comment from 2014.

achievements.title: Technical Sorcery
achievements.description: Dependency tree deep enough to contain a small civilisation.

achievements.title: VHS Rental
achievements.description: Convenient, regional, slightly grainy. Please rewind before returning.

achievements.title: Video Nasty
achievements.description: Banned in three regions. Watch only with the lights on.
